column1: Activity/Milestone
Project planning & setup
Finalize project scope, metrics, and success criteria.
Set up repo, Colab notebooks, and environment (PyTorch, torchvision, CUDA).
Implement experiment logging (TensorBoard or simple CSV logging)
Data loading & preprocessing
Implement CIFAR‑10 train/val/test dataloaders via torchvision.datasets
Add standard transforms: tensor conversion, normalization, random crop, horizontal flip.
(Optional) Add CIFAR‑100 loaders for later evaluation.
Baseline CNN implementation
Design CNN architecture (conv blocks, pooling, classifier head)
Implement forward pass, loss (cross‑entropy), optimizer, learning‑rate schedule.
Implement generic training loop and validation loop
Baseline CNN training & evaluation
Run initial training runs to debug pipeline
Tune key hyperparameters (lr, batch size, weight decay, data augmentation)
Train final baseline model to target 70–75% test accuracy
Save best model checkpoints and record metrics/plots
Pretrained CNN fine‑tuning
Select pretrained backbone (e.g., ResNet18) and load pretrained weights
Replace final layer for CIFAR‑10 classes and freeze lower layers
Run feature‑extractor training, then optionally unfreeze and fine‑tune more layers
Evaluate on test set and record accuracy and loss curves
Analysis, comparison & ablations (if time)
Compare baseline vs pretrained: accuracy, loss curves, training time
Generate confusion matrices and a few misclassified example images
(Optional) Small ablation: effect of augmentation or depth on baseline CNN
Report, slides, and final polish
Draft report: methods, experiments, results, and discussion
Create result figures and tables (learning curves, accuracy table)
Prepare final presentation slides and practice talk
Final code cleanup, README, and reproducibility instructions
